nasb.text: Where am I to get meat to give to all this people? For they weep before me, saying, ‘Give us meat that we may eat!’

esv.text: Where am I to get meat to give to all this people? For they weep before me and say, ‘Give us meat, that we may eat.’

cnv.text: 我從哪裡得肉給這人民吃呢？因為他們都向我哭著說：‘你給我們肉吃吧！’

ccb.text: 他们都哭着向我要肉吃，我去哪里找肉给他们吃呢？
